name: Bar-b-q Secret Thai Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 2 3/16 lb Black Tiger Shrimp, shell on
recipeInstructions:
1. Use commercially prepared Thai sauces such as "President's Choice - Spicy Thai Dressing" (in Canada).
2. Place marinated Shell-on Black Tiger Shrimp (rinsed if defrosted) in a bowl.
3. Marinate for 1-1/2 to 2 hours using enough sauce to cover the shrimp.
4. Do not marinate longer than recommended, as this may cause the shrimp to become rubbery.
5. Grill the marinated shrimp over hot coals for 3-4 minutes on each side.
6. Serve immediately with a suitable dipping sauce.
